notes: FlashAttention-style SDPA accelerator for Cadence competition. S=256, d=64, single batch/head, Q8.8 fixed-point I/O (16-bit), 40-bit accumulation, AXI4-Lite control + AXI4 Master DMA, online softmax + tiling, causal mask mandatory, <300K cycles latency, <=2M equivalent gates. Key constraint: must NOT store S*S attention matrix.
